title: Add canonical issue scope contract
body:
## Required Task Fields

```yaml
lane: validation_tooling
intelligence_level: frontier
reason: "Fixture includes complete canonical issue scope task fields."
durable_source_of_truth: "GitHub issue #230"
objective: "Generate a canonical issue scope object."
allowed_paths:
  - scripts/asgk.py
  - docs/control/COMPACT_GOVERNANCE_RED_TEAM.md
  - examples/compact_governance/**
  - examples/negative/compact_governance/**
expected_output:
  - canonical issue scope JSON
plan:
  - add command
checklist:
  - command passes
acceptance_sheet:
  - canonical scope is material
non_goals:
  - no compact PR body default
stop_conditions:
  - default governance behavior would change
rollback_expectations:
  - revert PR
```
